missions.title: Technical Architecture Baseline Documentation (First MVP Test, Already Executed)
missions.description: Historical first MVP mission: create a technical architecture baseline document for Lord of the Machines and link it from README so agents can use it as shared architecture context.

deliverables.description: Architecture overview, runtime flow, tools, mission lifecycle, and extension points.

required_readme_updates.description: Add a clear section that links to docs/technical-architecture-baseline.md.

acceptance_criteria: Document describes current architecture and mission runtime flow with concrete module references.
README includes a visible link to the architecture document.
Result is useful for new role agents to understand the system quickly.
